name: Christmas Season
description: The Christmas season celebrates the birth of Jesus Christ.

name: Ordinary Time (I)
description: Ordinary Time is a period of growth and reflection.

name: Lenten Season
description: Lent is a 40-day season of prayer, fasting, and almsgiving.

name: Easter Season
description: The Easter season celebrates the Resurrection of Jesus Christ.

name: Pentecost Sunday
description: Pentecost celebrates the descent of the Holy Spirit upon the Apostles.

name: Ordinary Time (II)
description: The longer period of Ordinary Time for growth in faith.

name: Advent Season
description: Advent is a season of joyful anticipation and preparation for Christmas.
